RawMarkdown:
## Scott Galloway
Email: scott.galloway@gmail.com | Phone: 07498479614 (please email in the first instance)
Blog: mostlylucid.net | GitHub: github.com/scottgal/mostlylucidweb
## Executive Summary
Technology leader with over two decades of experience scaling engineering teams and transforming legacy systems into modern, cloud-native architectures. Proven track record of delivering measurable business impact: 50% infrastructure cost reductions, 80% faster deployment cycles, and >90% reduction in runtime errors. Strong combination of hands-on technical expertise (ASP.NET Core, Azure, Kubernetes, AI/ML) and strategic leadership, having managed teams of 10+ engineers and operated a developer bootcamp with 200+ graduates achieving 90%+ placement rates. Expert in modernizing enterprise systems while maintaining business continuity and delivering rapid ROI.
## Core Competencies
Strategic Leadership: Engineering Management, Technical Strategy, Team Building & Mentorship, Agile/Scrum, Cross-functional Collaboration, Stakeholder Communication, Budget & Resource Management
Technical Architecture: Cloud-Native Design, Microservices, Domain-Driven Design (DDD), Legacy Modernization, Infrastructure-as-Code (IaC), CI/CD Strategy, Performance Optimization
Technology Stack: ASP.NET Core, .NET 6/7/8/9, Microsoft Azure, Kubernetes, Docker, Azure DevOps, C#
AI & Innovation: ML.NET, OpenAI Integration, LLM Orchestration, RAG Pipelines, Vector Embeddings, NLP, Azure AI Services
Data & DevOps: SQL Server, PostgreSQL, MongoDB, Cosmos DB, OpenSearch, GitHub Actions, GitLab CI/CD, Bicep
## Professional Experience
mostlylucid limited | Freelance CTO / Technical Consultant
Jan 2012 – Present | Remote
Led technical strategy and delivery for dozens of client engagements across fintech, healthcare, and ecommerce, consistently delivering measurable business outcomes through strategic technology initiatives.
Architected and executed enterprise-scale cloud migrations, achieving 50% infrastructure cost reduction and 80% improvement in deployment velocity while eliminating 90%+ of runtime errors
Founded and operated developer bootcamp serving 200+ graduates with 90%+ placement rate, demonstrating commitment to talent development and industry contribution
Designed and deployed AI-driven systems leveraging Azure OpenAI and vector embeddings for recommendation engines and lead generation, delivering competitive advantages for clients
Provided strategic technical leadership across diverse engagements: Lead Architect for major Asian airline booking system, R&D Developer for insurance telemetry platform, Research Systems Architect on UK Government National Security distributed computing project, and Technical Consultant for 8 international charities
ZenChef Ltd | Lead Contract Developer
Oct 2024 – Present | Remote
Led critical modernization of large distributed legacy system to .NET 8, significantly reducing Azure costs while improving system reliability and performance
Implemented comprehensive observability strategy using Application Insights and custom telemetry, enabling data-driven optimization decisions
Provided rapid technical leadership for complex microservices and event-driven architecture, ensuring business continuity during critical transitions
Very Jane Ltd | Senior Backend Developer
Apr 2024 – Aug 2024 | Remote
Drove backend development strategy for scalable ecommerce platform, integrating Stripe Connect and Hyperwallet payment systems
Architected new platform from scratch with robust data validation and testing infrastructure, ensuring reliable handling of customer data at scale
Seamcor Ltd | Head of Engineering (Contract)
Dec 2022 – Apr 2024 | Remote
Managed engineering team of 10+ developers through complete re-architecture of enterprise production management system, balancing technical excellence with business needs
Designed flexible deployment strategy supporting both cloud-native and cost-effective on-premises installations, expanding market reach and customer options
Led integration of Docker Compose and OpenSearch infrastructure, delivering powerful reporting and search capabilities with customer-specific deployment flexibility
GBG Plc (Loqate) | Lead Engineer
Aug 2022 – Nov 2022 | Remote
Architected high-performance global address validation system using .NET 6 microservices on Kubernetes
Established comprehensive testing infrastructure using K6, accelerating development cycles by 80% through rapid validation of changes and improvements
WCOM AB | Lead Developer (Contract)
Oct 2021 – May 2022 | Remote
Delivered real-time collaboration platform using Blazor Server, Azure Functions, and SignalR
Designed screen mirroring and IPC modules via WPF, significantly improving usability in logistics and remote work environments
H3Space Ltd | Lead Engineer
Jun 2021 – Sep 2021 | Remote
Designed complete backend cloud architecture for Unity-based SaaS platform with React frontend and GraphQL API
Recruited and led globally distributed development team, delivering MVP within 90-day timeline
Huozhi Ltd | Technical Consultant / Dev Lead
Jun 2018 – Mar 2020 | Remote
Led modernization of fintech platform, implementing performance profiling and API scalability improvements
Managed distributed team using Scrum methodology and CI/CD practices to achieve consistent biweekly releases
Interactive Reporting Ltd | Lead Developer (Contract)
Dec 2015 – Jun 2021 | Remote
Architected cross-platform reporting engine using ASP.NET MVC and WPF with multi-database support (SQL Server, MySQL, SQLite) for enterprise analytics workloads
Dell | Development Lead
Jan 2011 – Jul 2011 | Glasgow, UK
Architected internal machine provisioning platform with ASP.NET MVC and SQL Server, reducing setup time by 70%
Microsoft Corp. | Program Manager II
Jan 2007 – Oct 2009 | Redmond, WA
Managed ASP.NET release planning and coordinated cross-functional teams across Microsoft divisions
Led security platform development for Project Server, championing infrastructure redesign that improved compliance for enterprise deployments
Microsoft Ltd. | Application Development Consultant II
Jun 2005 – Jan 2007 | Reading, UK
Conducted enterprise performance audits and delivered strategic architecture improvement plans to FTSE 100 clients
StormID | Lead Developer
Feb 2003 – Jun 2005 | Edinburgh, UK
Delivered bespoke CMS and ecommerce solutions using .NET and SQL Server under demanding agency timelines
## Education
University of Stirling – BSc (Hons) Psychology
Stirling, Scotland, UK
